title: Fancy Food
body:
**Spice up your meal** with food like a **Honey Apple**, the **Hellish Stew**, **Tiramisu**, a **Dragons Feast** or **Ender Pearl Caviar**. No comlicated cooking, just craft and relish.
![Overview of the added food items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Uvysj2Bw/images/137b04a3aa71f26cc9187fdaeae95063270f11e9.png)
